title: Make item read only on status change

posts.author: Marcus_Millgate (Marcus Millgate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

when a status changes, the current assigned user is unable to edit the item again but only view it even if they created the item previously, only board owners or people assigned can edit.

What are you trying to achieve

when a status changes, the user is unable to edit the item again but only view it.
